title: agrostis pilosula var. royleana
intro: Agrostis pilosula var. royleana, also known as Royle's bent grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Agrostis pilosula var. royleana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used as a natural remedy for its potential health benefits.
